title: conformance phase 2.5-special-transcendental: ferrotorch-core::activations, transcendental, special — 84 items pending
description:
Tracking: phase 2.5-special-transcendental of the ferrotorch-core conformance suite (parent issue #759).

**Module(s) covered:** grad_fns/activation.rs, grad_fns/transcendental.rs, special.rs
**Item count:** 84 `pub` items.

## Mandate

Each public item below requires CPU + GPU + autograd-where-applicable
conformance test coverage referenced from `ferrotorch-core/tests/conformance_*.rs`.
Until this phase lands its tests, every item here is excluded in
`ferrotorch-core/tests/conformance/_surface_exclusions.toml` with this issue
as its `tracking_issue` field. The strict gate
(`tests/conformance_surface_coverage.rs`) enforces the contract.

## Items pending
